svg.title: Stock direction predictor pipeline
svg.desc: Two-stream architecture: Stream A processes multilingual NLP sentiment, Stream B processes historical price data. Both fuse into a binary LSTM prediction head, feeding an adaptive learning system.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the RSS/News scraping component in the stock predictor pipeline')
sendPrompt('How does FinBERT scoring work and why is it used for English sentiment?')
sendPrompt('How does custom MuRIL scoring work for Hindi financial news?')
sendPrompt('How should the Sentiment Aggregator merge FinBERT and MuRIL scores?')
sendPrompt('What is the Handshake CSV in this pipeline and why is it needed?')
sendPrompt('What is OHLCV data and how many years should I use for training?')
sendPrompt('What feature engineering steps should I apply to OHLCV stock data?')
sendPrompt('Which technical indicators matter most for directional prediction: RSI, MA, or volatility?')
sendPrompt('How does dynamic window sizing work and what window lengths should I try?')
sendPrompt('How should price features and sentiment be fused into a hidden state before the LSTM?')
sendPrompt('How should I configure a 3-layer binary LSTM for stock direction prediction?')
sendPrompt('How does Monte Carlo dropout work for uncertainty estimation in stock prediction?')
sendPrompt('How should I output directional prediction and confidence score from the LSTM head?')
sendPrompt('How does daily trust update work in adaptive learning for stock prediction?')
sendPrompt('How does EWC (Elastic Weight Consolidation) work for weekly model nudging?')
sendPrompt('When and how should I do monthly full retraining in the adaptive learning system?')
